text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer. Let's seize the day, shall
we?
choice_data_list: You sure are motivated this morning.
You sure are motivated this morning.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, well, you see... Something wonderful has
happened.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: "How are you doing, Ardan? Back then..."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
"I said that you'd never be able to run. I'm really
sorry about that."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
"I saw you racing on TV, and you know? And you
were so, so cool!"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
"So I'm going to work harder than ever so I can
recover and be just as cool as you!"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes... A letter from a girl who was in the same
hospital as I was, many years ago.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My running has brought light to another's heart. I
take great pride in that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Now then, let's go. This heart, these legs...
They've been blessed with an irreplaceable honor!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her head held high, Mejiro Ardan looks even
prouder than usual today.
